produced_by: AUTHORED (manual) — demiurge 7-verb spine 시연. 실제 producer dispatch는 honest-skip (gating 아래 참조).

dispatch_provenance.interpretation: dispatch(manifest load · deps check)는 정상 동작 — producer(stdlib/antimatter/specify.py) 부재로 honest-skip (⏭). 7-verb production stdlib-gated 현실 (project_demiurge_7verb_production_gated · #852). ANTIMATTER 신규 도메인이라 7 producer 전부 부재.

target_spec.objective: 자기최소(magnetic-minimum) 트랩 안에 중성 반수소(H̄)를 < 0.5 K 로 가두기
target_spec.antiproton_source: AD/ELENA (CERN Antiproton Decelerator + Extra Low ENergy Antiproton ring) — 100 keV p̄ delivery
target_spec.positron_source: 양전자 축적기(positron accumulator) — ²²Na β⁺ source + buffer-gas Surko trap 축적
target_spec.trap_class: Ioffe-Pritchard 자기최소 트랩 (저자기장추종 ground-state H̄, μ≈μ_B 가둠)
target_spec.T_th_source_stage: ⓵생성 pair-production threshold T_th = 6·m_p·c² = 5629.632 MeV (≈5.63 GeV) — 빔 충돌로 p̄ 생성
target_spec.decel_ladder_source_stage: ⓶감속 AD/ELENA relativistic ladder GeV→keV (T=√((pc)²+(m_p c²)²)−m_p c²)

acceptance_gates: trap depth ≥ target T (< 0.5 K window)
p̄ catch + e⁺ accumulation 동시 가용
scope_caveats: CPT-symmetry 실험 spec skeleton — TEMPLATE. 실측 oracle (실제 반수소 생성·측정) 은 CERN AD facility downstream wet-lab.
measurement_gate = GATE_OPEN 영구 — specify 는 illustrative, absorption claim 아님 (g3).
demiurge 는 측정을 originate 하지 않음 — public PDG/실험 상수를 COPY (manifest domain caveat).
